reviews.review_description: This game has so much to do many maps and a perfect player model there is many games to play and when I first played it I couldn’t stop it is the best game ever it’s obvious that they put as much effort possible and it definitely took way longer than a decade this game is amazing

developer_response.body: yes many more map soon in 1.23819 day,, god bless

reviews.review_description: This game is great to play with freinds, has a beautiful player model, and is just a great game. There are many games to play and a lot of good maps. I'd say this is the best game on vr rn and it is clear that the dev/devs put a lot of effort into it.

developer_response.body: yes yes i put very lots of efforts into this game,,, update soon god bless

reviews.review_description: remember just add more stuff to make this not as boring for us other people make sure you have a great time home making this and if you don't you don't have to keep on making more stuff in the game
